name: Nakhon Nayok city core
notes: Provincial capital and primary urban node with the strongest baseline demand in the province.

name: Ongkharak medical-education node
notes: Strong district node on Route 305 with university and major medical demand.

name: Ban Na gateway town
notes: Service town and junction toward Saraburi and Prachin Buri with moderate year-round demand.

name: Pak Phli district center
notes: Smaller east-side service node supporting local community coverage and interior travel.
